title: quercus × fuscata
intro: Quercus × fuscata, also known as the Chinese white oak, is a hybrid species of deciduous tree that is native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Quercus × fuscata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids in its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Quercus × fuscata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to protect against certain types of cancer and neurological disorders. Quercus × fuscata is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to promote overall health and well-being, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine.
